description_long: This house is a large, modern residential estate enclosed by a black perimeter fence, featuring multiple interconnected structures with steep, dark conical and hipped roofs. The main building is flanked by two detached wings, one of which appears to be a garage with a driveway and parked car, while the other is a separate guest or utility building. The central courtyard includes a spacious swimming pool with a deck and poolside furniture, and there is a tennis court at the rear of the property. The facade is characterized by blue-gray walls, large rectangular windows arranged in rows, and a prominent main entrance with a double-door, steps, and a landscaped path. The property is surrounded by paved and green areas, providing a luxurious and private urban living environment.
description: A large, modern estate with multiple conical-roofed buildings, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped grounds, all enclosed by a black fence. The house features blue-gray walls, large windows, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with car, and the symmetrical arrangement of the main house and wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of conical roofs, the driveway, and the pool area behind the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, tennis court, and the back facades of the house and wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tennis court, green spaces, and the rear of the main house with visible windows and roof shapes.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with steps, landscaped path, and no porch or columns
